rulings.Case Title: FANNIE MAE VS. SUTTER GOUGH, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Osc Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed And Tro Re: 1480 Sutter Street, San Francisco, Ca 94109
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 18, 2016, line 2. Osc Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed And Tro Re: 1480 Sutter Street, San Francisco, Ca 94109 is continued to November 28, 2016 for defendant to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than November 18, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MID-BLOCK PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. MARK TAYLOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Vacate Default And Judgment; Mpa; Declaration;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 18, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT MIQUAN BROOKS To Vacate Default And Judgment is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden under CCP 473.5 re: lack of actual knowledge, etc. Opposing party failed to produce any evidence to the contrary. =(501/REQ)
